domain: sperm-whale coda dialect (DSWP/Sharma 2024) -- cetacean communication; SEALED consumer-relative flip
class: CONFIRMED (promotes the exploratory whale a2_probe verdict to a sealed flip)
data: DominicaCodas.csv (sw-combinatoriality): 8718 codas, 11-d ICI rhythm features; shuffle seed 0; calibration 2/3, held-out 1/3 disjoint
consumer: Clan (dialect) classifier; downstream = Clan-logit AUROC (imbalanced 89% majority -> AUROC not accuracy)
read_operator: GO-1 blind margin probe S=w wT, top-r=4 low-rank; eigenbasis quantiser (as GO-P-2026-036)
verdict: CONFIRMED (4/4). Read-preserving preserves the Clan-dialect logit AUROC (0.934) far better than reconstruction-optimal (0.883) while reconstruction-optimal reconstructs the coda features 2x better (0.431 vs 0.889) -- the consumer-relative flip, SEALED, on cetacean communication. Anchors the two-axis regime map's correlated-isotropic cell with a sealed confirmation rather than an a2_probe verdict; the whale row is promoted from exploratory to sealed.
